# Contents

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- Tensiometer and Lysimeter trials in Ebro, Spain 

- Data Summary

- Exploratory data analysis

- Statistical data analysis
  
- Summary

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# Tensiometer and Lysimeter trials in Ebro, Spain

## Tensiometer

- 2 locations Valtierra & Almudevar

- 1 ssc ( DKC6836SC) and 1 tall (DKC6228 in Valtierra, DKC6980 in Almudevar).  

- Weenat study. 2 locs x 2 hybrids x 3 reps x 3 Depth (30,60 and 90 cm).  

- Daily Data collected:  Hydrid Potential kPa at 30cm, 60 cm and 90 cm  

- Data recorded: BBCH, Irrigation, radiation, temperature max and min, soil temperatureat 30,60 and 90 cm, Evapotranspiration, GDD  

- From 28 of may (BBCH 10) till 30 of September (BBCH 29)

## Lysimeter 


- 2 locations Valtierra & Almudevar  

- 1 ssc ( DKC6836SC) and 1 tall (DKC6228 in Valtierra, DKC6980 in Almudevar).

Water extraction:   

- From 10th June to October, weekly   
- 2 locs x 2 hybrids x 2 Depth (30,60cm) X 1-3 reps  
- Data collected:ph, EC, K,Ca, Na, NO3  
- Leaf sampling sap: young and old leaves.  
- From June to October, weekly  
- 2 locs x 2 hybrids   
- Data collected:Sugar, ph, EC, K,Ca, k/ca, Mg,  Na, NH4, NO3, N, Cl, Si, Fe, MN, Zn, Cu, Mo Al  


Other data collected. Data recorded: BBCH, Irrigation, radiation, temperature max and min, soil temperatureat 30,60 and 90 cm, Evapotranspiration, GDD



# Data Summary


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(stringr)

turkey_data_irr = read_excel("/mnt/data/Row data Lysimeter tensiometer wheather for Naha.xlsx",sheet=2)


unique(turkey_data_irr$LOCATION )
unique(turkey_data_irr$VARIETY)

summary(turkey_data_irr$BBCH)

summary(turkey_data_irr$DATE)


summary(turkey_data_irr$`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`)
#turkey_data_irr = read_excel("/mnt/data/SSC Irricagation results final v3 revized.xlsx",skip=3)

names(turkey_data_irr)[7] = "replicate"

p <- ggplot(turkey_data_irr, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm`, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil moisture - Raw data")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)
#plotly::ggplotly(p)

p <- ggplot(turkey_data_irr, aes(x=BBCH, y=`Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm`, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil moisture - Raw data")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)
#plotly::ggplotly(p)

turkey_data_irr_summary = turkey_data_irr %>% group_by(LOCATION,DATE,VARIETY) %>% mutate(number_of_data_points = n())

hydric_potential = turkey_data_irr %>% dplyr::select(DATE,LOCATION,VARIETY,BBCH,replicate,`Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm`,`Hydric potential (kPa) 60 cm`,`Hydric potential (kPa) 90 cm` ,`Evapotranspiration (mm)`, `Accumulated degree days`  )

hydric_potential_long = hydric_potential %>% gather(type, value,6:10)

hydric_potential_long = hydric_potential_long %>% filter(!is.na(value))

#outlier screening

hydric_potential_long= hydric_potential_long %>% group_by(DATE,LOCATION,VARIETY,type) %>% mutate(number_of_data_points= n())

hydric_potential_long_1 = filter(hydric_potential_long, number_of_data_points>1)
                                                                                                 
hydric_potential_long_1= hydric_potential_long_1 %>% group_by(DATE,LOCATION,VARIETY,type) %>% mutate(mean_value=mean(value,na.rm=T),sd_value=sd(value,na.rm=T),yield_upper_sd_filter = mean_value+2.5*sd_value,yield_lower_sd_filter = mean_value-2.5*sd_value)


  
   hydric_potential_long_1 = hydric_potential_long_1 %>% mutate(value_sd_filter= ifelse(value>yield_upper_sd_filter,"TRUE",ifelse(value<yield_lower_sd_filter,"TRUE","FALSE")))
   
   #hydric_potential_long_2 = filter(hydric_potential_long_1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
   
   hydric_potential_long_1_summary= hydric_potential_long_1 %>% group_by(DATE,LOCATION,VARIETY,type)%>% mutate(mean_value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

  hydric_potential_long_1_summary = hydric_potential_long_1_summary %>% mutate(trait= ifelse(type %in% c("Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm","Hydric potential (kPa) 60 cm","Hydric potential (kPa) 90 cm"),"hydric_potential",type))   


rain_data = turkey_data_irr %>% dplyr::select(DATE,LOCATION,`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`)

#rain_data = rain_data%>% filter(date<="2023-09-15")

rain_data = rain_data%>% filter(`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`>0)

rain_data = rain_data %>% mutate(rain_class= ifelse(`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`<0.5, "Irrigation/Precipitation<0.5mm",ifelse(`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`<5, "Irrigation/Precipitation (mm):0.5-5mm",ifelse(`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`<15, "Irrigation/Precipitation (mm):5-15mm",ifelse(`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`>=15, "Irrigation/Precipitation (mm): >15mm",NA)))))

rain_data_1 = filter(rain_data, rain_class %in% c("Irrigation/Precipitation (mm):5-10mm","Irrigation/Precipitation (mm): >15mm") )

hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary, trait=="hydric_potential")


#calculating WUE
#For the WUE I think this is correct, but maybe you can use as units KG/mm3 to avoid so much decimals.



```

# Replicate comparison

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric = hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric %>% unite(variety_rep, VARIETY,replicate, sep="_rep",remove=F)

#rain_data_loc1 = filter(rain_data_1, LOCATION=="ALMUDEVAR" )
#rain_data_loc1_all = filter(rain_data, LOCATION=="ALMUDEVAR" )

hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1 = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric,LOCATION=="ALMUDEVAR")

p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=value, color=variety_rep,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety and replicate")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
plotly::ggplotly(p)



hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1 = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric,LOCATION!="ALMUDEVAR")

p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=value, color=variety_rep,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety and replicate")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

```

- Removal of data points with one replicate per day

- SD outlier filtering for 2 and 3 replicates per day

- No SD based outliers were found for Tensiometer based results



# In location ALMUDEVAR

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1 = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric,LOCATION=="ALMUDEVAR" )

rain_data_loc1 = filter(rain_data_1, LOCATION=="ALMUDEVAR" )
rain_data_loc1_all = filter(rain_data, LOCATION=="ALMUDEVAR" )

rain_data_loc1_all = unique(rain_data_loc1_all)



p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_value, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

g=ggplot(rain_data_loc1_all, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`, fill=rain_class,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity") + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Irrigation/Precipitation (mm) during the growing season")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab("Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)")
print(g)

p=p+geom_vline(data = rain_data_loc1,aes(xintercept = as.Date(DATE),color = rain_class), linetype = "dashed") + geom_text(data = rain_data_loc1,aes(x=as.Date(DATE), label="", y=1.5), colour="blue", angle=90, text=element_text(size=11))
print(p)



p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_value, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
#plotly::ggplotly(p)



p=p+geom_vline(data = rain_data_loc1_all,aes(xintercept = as.Date(DATE),color = rain_class), linetype = "dashed") + geom_text(data = rain_data_loc1,aes(x=as.Date(DATE), label="", y=1.5), colour="blue", angle=90, text=element_text(size=11))
print(p)


p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_value, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
#plotly::ggplotly(p)



```



# In location Valtierra


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1 = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric,LOCATION!="ALMUDEVAR" )

rain_data_loc1 = filter(rain_data_1, LOCATION!="ALMUDEVAR" )
rain_data_loc1_all = filter(rain_data, LOCATION!="ALMUDEVAR" )

rain_data_loc1_all = unique(rain_data_loc1_all)



p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_value, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

g=ggplot(rain_data_loc1_all, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)`, fill=rain_class,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity") + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Irrigation/Precipitation (mm) during the growing season")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab("Irrigation/Precipitation (mm)")

print(g)

p=p+geom_vline(data = rain_data_loc1,aes(xintercept = as.Date(DATE),color = rain_class), linetype = "dashed") + geom_text(data = rain_data_loc1,aes(x=as.Date(DATE), label="", y=1.5), colour="blue", angle=90, text=element_text(size=11))
print(p)



p <- ggplot(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_value, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Hydric Potential (Kpa) at different soil depths per Variety")+facet_grid(type~LOCATION)+ylab("Hydric potential (Kpa)")
#plotly::ggplotly(p)



p=p+geom_vline(data = rain_data_loc1_all,aes(xintercept = as.Date(DATE),color = rain_class), linetype = "dashed") + geom_text(data = rain_data_loc1,aes(x=as.Date(DATE), label="", y=1.5), colour="blue", angle=90, text=element_text(size=11))
print(p)
```



# Statistical analysis - Amludevar location

I will continue with the statistical analysis of hydric potential data at different soil depths between SSC vs Tall for the 3 time periods that you mentioned:
-	15th of august to 24th august
-	2nd September to 20th of September
-	15th August till 20 of September

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
###Function which flags plot values with DSR > threshold for DSR traits 
data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location = function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(type == traits[i])
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(VARIETY)  + (1|replicate),data=temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}
#model SSC vs DKC
model_ssc_dkc = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
 mmod <- lmer(value ~ Irrigation  * hybrid + (1|Location/Rep)+ (1|Location:Irrigation)+ +(1|Location:Irrigation:hybrid) ,data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
#plot_lsmeans(lsm1.df)

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
 
 print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  

  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}

#model ssc vs dkc low yielding
model_ssc_dkc_low = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
  mmod <- lmer(value ~ Irrigation  * hybrid + (1|Rep) ,data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
#plot_lsmeans(lsm1.df)

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
 
 print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  

  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}

#


#lsmeans, delta for ssc only
model_ssc_only = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
 mmod = lmer(value ~ as.factor(VARIETY) + (1|replicate),data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 
 #print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~VARIETY)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}


#across location

across_location = function(data_df_long){
  traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  analysis_type="Across locations"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, type == traits[i])
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
   model = lmer(value ~ irrigation_percent  * hybrid_interrow_width_cm + (1|Location/Replicate)+ (1|Location:irrigation_percent)+ +(1|Location:irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm) ,data=temp)
    anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
    anova_table$Field = NULL
    anova_table$Trait= traits[i]
     anova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      lsm.df = create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm.df$Trait= traits[i]
     lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta.df = create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta.df$Trait= traits[i]
    delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}

create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new = function(model,test.set,field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  #Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$Protocol),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  names(lsm1.df)[1] = "Level"
  #print(names(lsm1.df))
  lsm1.df = data.frame(lsm1.df$Level,lsm1.df$hybrid_interrow_width_cm,lsm1.df$lsmean,lsm1.df$SE,lsm1.df$df,lsm1.df$lower.CL,lsm1.df$upper.CL,lsm1.df$.group)
  names(lsm1.df) = c("Factor","Group1","lsmean","SE","DF","Lower_CI","Upper_CI","Group")
  lsm1.df$Field = field
  lsm1.df$analysis_type=analysis_type
  lsm1.df= lsm1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  return(lsm1.df)
}

create_anova_table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  anv = as.data.frame(anova(model))
  Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(model)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  anv$Field = field
  anv$analysis_type = analysis_type
  
anv = anv %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(`Pr(>F)`<0.05, "Significant","Not significant"))
#https://davidgohel.github.io/flextable/articles/format.html
#print(names(anv))
anv = anv[c(9,10,2,3,5:8,11)]
 # anova.table$Num.Fields = n.fields
#  anova.table$Trait = trait.name
  #colnames(anova.table) = c("Protocol","Effect","numDF","denDF","F-value","P-value","CV")
  #anv$field=field
  
  return(anv)
}


create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)
  delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  
  ## separating contrast column to treatment 1 and treatment 2
  
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  ## Parsing the Contrast column and generating the first and second columns
  # contrast.rcbd = as.character(delta1.df$contrast)
  # V1 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # V2 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # for(j in 1:dim(delta1.df)[1]){
  #   contrast.part = strsplit(contrast.rcbd[j]," - ")
  #   V1[j] = contrast.part[[1]][1]
  #   V2[j] = contrast.part[[1]][2]
  # }
  # delta1.df = data.frame(Protocol,Set,Factor,V1,V2,delta1.df$estimate,delta1.df$p.value) 
  # delta1.df$sig.1 = ifelse(delta1.df$delta1.df.p.value<0.1,TRUE,FALSE)
  # names(delta1.df) = c("Protocol","Set","Factor","V1","V2","Diff","Pvalue","Sig_At_10percent")
  #delta1.df$Observation = field
  delta1.df$Field=field
  delta1.df$analysis_type = analysis_type
  return(delta1.df)
}

# ssc_data_model = ssc_data_all[,c(1:14,32,39,44:47,52)]
# ssc_data_model = filter(ssc_data_model, country=="greece")
# #ssc_data_model_1 = filter(ssc_data_model, )
# ssc_data_long = ssc_data_model%>% gather(type, value, 14:20)
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long,type!="yield_t_per_ha")
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long, !is.na(value))
# ssc_data_long$value = as.double(ssc_data_long$value )
# traits = unique(ssc_data_long$type)
# all_locations = unique(ssc_data_all$Location)
# ssc_data_outlier = data.frame()
#   for (i in 1:length(all_locations)){
#   
#   outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(ssc_data_long,3.5)
#   table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)
#   ssc_data_outlier = rbind(ssc_data_outlier,outlier_data )
#   }

by_location_analysis = function(data_df_long){
  #traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  #data_df_long$rep = as.factor(data_df_long$rep)
traits= unique(data_df_long$type)
 
  analysis_type="Across location"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    temp = filter(temp, value!="NA")
    #print(dim(temp))
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
     # model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ productName+ (1|unique_location_name), data = temp)
 mmod = lmer(value ~ as.factor(VARIETY) + (1|replicate),data=temp)
     
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
      
    #anova_table$Field = NULL
    anv$Trait= traits[i]
     #nova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
     #print(head(anova_table))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anv)
      #View(anova.df)
 lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~VARIETY)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)      #lsm.df = create_TwoFactor_lsmeans_table(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      #
     # lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm1.df$Trait= traits[i]
    # lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm1.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
      #delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta1.df$Trait= traits[i]
    #delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta1.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}


 
 
  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


```

## 15th of august to 24th august

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric, DATE>="2024-08-15")
model_data = filter(model_data, DATE<="2024-08-24")

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$value = as.double(model_data$value )

model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$VARIETY = as.factor(ssc_data$VARIETY)

ssc_data$replicate  = as.factor(ssc_data$replicate  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( VARIETY,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(VARIETY)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = VARIETY), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = VARIETY), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential at Amludevar location: Induced Stress Phase 1 - 15th to 24th August")
plot_lsmeans

#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


## 2nd September to 20th of September


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric, DATE>="2024-09-02")
model_data = filter(model_data, DATE<="2024-09-20")

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$value = as.double(model_data$value )

model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  #only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$VARIETY = as.factor(ssc_data$VARIETY)

ssc_data$replicate  = as.factor(ssc_data$replicate  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( VARIETY,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(VARIETY)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = VARIETY), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = VARIETY), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential at Amludevar location: Induced Stress Phase 2 - 2nd to 20th September")
plot_lsmeans

#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

```

## 15th August till 20 of September


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data = filter(hydric_potential_long_1_summary_hydric, DATE>="2024-08-15")
model_data = filter(model_data, DATE<="2024-09-20")

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$value = as.double(model_data$value )

model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$VARIETY = as.factor(ssc_data$VARIETY)

ssc_data$replicate  = as.factor(ssc_data$replicate  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( VARIETY,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(VARIETY)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = VARIETY), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = VARIETY), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential at Amludevar location: Induced Stress Phase - 15th of August to 20th September")
plot_lsmeans

#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

```


# Lysimeter data analysis

Aim:-	To compare statistically the N,P & K levels between SSC (young, old leaf) VS Tall (young, old leaf)?




- The more important is P and K but aslo important the others as CA, Mg, NA. N is not important as the soil was saturated of N.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(stringr)

lysimeter = read_excel("/mnt/data/ebro_lysimeter_data.xlsx",sheet=1)

lysimeter_1 = read_excel("/mnt/data/Row data Lysimeter tensiometer wheather for Naha_2.xlsx",sheet=1)

lysimeter_1 =lysimeter_1 %>% mutate(variety_rep= paste(VARIETY, "_rep",TRIAL, sep=""))

lysimeter_1_summary = lysimeter_1 %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,DATE,`Type of analysis`) %>% summarise(mean_Phosphorous_ppm= mean(`P - Phosphorous\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Potassium_ppm= mean(`K - Potassium\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Calcium_ppm= mean(`Ca - Calcium\r\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Magnesium_ppm= mean(`Mg - Magnesium\r\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Sodium_ppm= mean(`Na - Sodium\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Sulfur_ppm= mean(`S - Sulfur\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Zinc_ppm= mean(`Zn - Zinc\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Sulfur_ppm= mean(`S - Sulfur\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Ammonium_ppm= mean(`NH4 - Ammonium\r\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Nitrate_ppm= mean(`NO3 - Nitrate\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Total_Nitrogen_ppm= mean(`N - Total Nitrogen\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_sugar_percent= mean(`Sugar\r\n%`,na.rm=T),mean_pH= mean(`pH\r\r\n`,na.rm=T))

lysimeter_sap = lysimeter %>% filter(`Type of analysis`== "Plant sap")

lysimeter_sap =lysimeter_sap %>% unite(variety_leaf_type, VARIETY, `Type of leaf`, sep="_",remove=F)

lysimeter_sap_summary = lysimeter_sap %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,`Type of leaf`,variety_leaf_type) %>% summarise(mean_Phosphorous_ppm= mean(`P - Phosphorous\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Potassium_ppm= mean(`K - Potassium\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Calcium_ppm= mean(`Ca - Calcium\r\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Magnesium_ppm= mean(`Mg - Magnesium\r\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Sodium_ppm= mean(`Na - Sodium\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Sulfur_ppm= mean(`S - Sulfur\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Zinc_ppm= mean(`Zn - Zinc\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Sulfur_ppm= mean(`S - Sulfur\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Ammonium_ppm= mean(`NH4 - Ammonium\r\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Nitrate_ppm= mean(`NO3 - Nitrate\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_Total_Nitrogen_ppm= mean(`N - Total Nitrogen\r\nppm`,na.rm=T),mean_sugar_percent= mean(`Sugar\r\n%`,na.rm=T),mean_pH= mean(`pH\r\r\n`,na.rm=T))


```



## Nutrients in soil at different depths

### Potassium

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`K - Potassium\r\nppm`, color=variety_rep,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point()  + geom_smooth(se=FALSE)+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrients in soil at different depth: Potassium ppm")+facet_grid(`Type of analysis`~LOCATION,scales="free_y")+ylab(("Potassium ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)



p <- ggplot(lysimeter_1_summary, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_Potassium_ppm, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point()  + geom_smooth()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrients in soil at different depth: Mean Potassium ppm")+facet_grid(`Type of analysis`~LOCATION,scales="free_y")+ylab(("Mean Potassium ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

### Calcium

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Ca - Calcium\r\r\nppm`, color=variety_rep,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point()  + geom_smooth(se=FALSE)+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrients in soil at different depth: Calcium ppm")+facet_grid(`Type of analysis`~LOCATION,scales="free_y")+ylab(("Calcium ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)


p <- ggplot(lysimeter_1_summary, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_Calcium_ppm, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point()  + geom_smooth()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrients in soil at different depth: mean_Calcium_ppm")+facet_grid(`Type of analysis`~LOCATION,scales="free_y")+ylab(("mean_Calcium_ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)

```


### Sodium 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_1, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Na - Sodium\r\nppm`, color=variety_rep,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point()  + geom_smooth(se=FALSE)+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrients in soil at different depth: Sodium ppm")+facet_grid(`Type of analysis`~LOCATION,scales="free_y")+ylab(("Sodium ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)


p <- ggplot(lysimeter_1_summary, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=mean_Sodium_ppm, color=VARIETY,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point()  + geom_smooth()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrients in soil at different depth: mean_Sodium_ppm")+facet_grid(`Type of analysis`~LOCATION,scales="free_y")+ylab(("mean_Sodium_ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)

```

## Nutrient content in the leaf

### Potassium

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`K - Potassium\r\nppm`, color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Potassium ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Potassium ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)


p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`K - Potassium\r\nppm`, color=variety_leaf_type,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Potassium ppm")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+ylab(("Potassium ppm"))
#plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Potassium_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Potassium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Potassium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Potassium_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Potassium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Potassium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

### Phosphorus

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`P - Phosphorous\r\nppm`, color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Phosphorous ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Phosphorous ppm"))

plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Phosphorous_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Phosphorous_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Phosphorous ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Phosphorous_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Phosphorous_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Phosphorous ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )

```

### Calcium

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Ca - Calcium\r\r\nppm`, color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Calcium ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Calcium ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Calcium_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Calcium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Calcium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Calcium_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Calcium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Calcium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )

```

### Magnesium

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10,fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Mg - Magnesium\r\r\nppm`, color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Magnesium ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Magnesium ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Magnesium_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Magnesium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Magnesium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10,fig.height=10}

     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Magnesium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Magnesium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

### Sodium

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10,fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Na - Sodium\r\nppm` , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Sodium ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Sodium ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Sodium_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Sodium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Sodium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10,fig.height=10}
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Sodium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Sodium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`S - Sulfur\r\nppm`  , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Sulfur ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Sulfur ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Sulfur_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Sulfur_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Sulfur ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Sulfur_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Sulfur ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Zinc ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Zinc ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Zinc_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Zinc_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Zinc ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Zinc_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Zinc ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),

```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`NH4 - Ammonium\r\r\nppm`  , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Ammonium ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Ammonium ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Ammonium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Ammonium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),

```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Ammonium_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Ammonium ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

### Nitrate

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`NO3 - Nitrate\r\nppm` , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: NO3 - Nitrate ppm")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("NO3 - Nitrate ppm"))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Nitrate_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Nitrate_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Nitrate ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Nitrate_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Nitrate_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Nitrate ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```


### Total Nitrogen

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`N - Total Nitrogen\r\nppm`  , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("`Nutrient content in leaf: N - Total Nitrogen ppm` ")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("`N - Total Nitrogen ppm` "))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Total_Nitrogen_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Total_Nitrogen_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Total Nitrogen ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_Total_Nitrogen_ppm, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_Total_Nitrogen_ppm,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Total Nitrogen ppm")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )


```

### Sugar (%)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`Sugar\r\n%` , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Sugar (%) ")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("Sugar (%) "))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_sugar_percent, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_sugar_percent,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Sugar (%)")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_sugar_percent, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_sugar_percent,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("Nutrient content in leaf: Mean Sugar (%)")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```


### pH

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p <- ggplot(lysimeter_sap, aes(x=as.Date(DATE), y=`pH\r\r\n`  , color=variety_leaf_type,linetype=`Type of leaf`,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(se=FALSE) +
  xlab("")+ggtitle("pH ")+facet_grid(~LOCATION)+ylab(("pH "))
plotly::ggplotly(p)

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_pH, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(~LOCATION, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_pH,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("pH")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )


```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

ggplot(lysimeter_sap_summary,aes(variety_leaf_type,mean_pH, fill=VARIETY ))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_wrap(LOCATION~`Type of leaf`, scales="free_x")+
     geom_text(aes(label=round(mean_pH,1)), vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ggtitle("pH")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )
```

```{r echo=F}
data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location_lysimeter = 
function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(type == traits[i])
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(hybrid_type_leaf)  + (1|LOCATION),data=temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}
```


# Statistical analysis - Lysimeter data

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=10, fig.height=5}












#turkey_data_irr = read_excel("/mnt/data/SSC Irricagation results final v3 revized.xlsx",skip=3)

#names(turkey_data_irr)[7] = "replicate"







































ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436","DKC6836SC","DKC7236SC","ET6641SC","DKC6648SC")
 
lysimeter_sap_summary = lysimeter_sap_summary %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(VARIETY %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

lysimeter_sap_summary =lysimeter_sap_summary %>% mutate(hybrid_type_leaf= paste(hybrid_type, `Type of leaf`, sep="_"))


lysimeter_sap_summary_long = lysimeter_sap_summary %>% gather(type,value,5:16)
#calculating WUE
#For the WUE I think this is correct, but maybe you can use as units KG/mm3 to avoid so much decimals.
traits = unique(lysimeter_sap_summary_long$type)
outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location_lysimeter(lysimeter_sap_summary_long,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=15, fig.height=15}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$VARIETY = as.factor(ssc_data$hybrid_type_leaf)

ssc_data$replicate  = as.factor(ssc_data$LOCATION  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")
lsmeans_results_ps = lsmeans_results_ps %>% separate(VARIETY, into=c("hybrid","leaft_type"),sep="_",remove=F)

lsmeans_results_ps_1 = filter(lsmeans_results_ps, Trait %in% c("mean_Phosphorous_ppm","mean_Potassium_ppm","mean_Sulfur_ppm","mean_Zinc_ppm"))

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps_1,aes(reorder( VARIETY,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(VARIETY)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = VARIETY), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = VARIETY), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid_Leaf_type")+facet_wrap(Trait~leaft_type,scales="free")+ggtitle("Statistical comparison of mineral levels in the leaf between SSC vs Tall across 2 locations")
plot_lsmeans

#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

lsmeans_results_ps_2 = filter(lsmeans_results_ps, Trait %in% c("mean_Calcium_ppm","mean_Magnesium_ppm","mean_Sodium_ppm"  ))

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps_2,aes(reorder( VARIETY,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(VARIETY)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = VARIETY), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = VARIETY), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid_Leaf_type")+facet_wrap(Trait~leaft_type,scales="free")+ggtitle("Statistical comparison of mineral levels in the leaf between SSC vs Tall across 2 locations")
plot_lsmeans

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

```
